what_it_does: Records metadata that links a channel attachment (att-96c0eed1) to a board item via a board:// URI, with a channel name and an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content after the frontmatter block.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference item-728e1e2b.
The file is purely a metadata envelope with no embedded payload.
The filename is the same UUID as the id field (att-96c0eed1).
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Keeps the markdown body empty, treating the file as a structured record rather than prose.
concerns: The board:// URI cannot be resolved or validated from the contents of this file alone.
No author or provenance field is recorded.
The actual content or purpose of the linked board item is not included.
notes: This is a thin metadata stub that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-728e1e2b.
questions: What content or artifact is actually attached to board item item-728e1e2b?
Who created this attachment and why?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship (e.g., comment, file, reference)?
purpose_vs_actual: The attachment_type and target imply the file links a channel attachment to a board item; the file itself contains only that link metadata, not the board item content.
apparent_themes: Lightweight metadata linking between channel memory and board items.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the relationship can be looked up later.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme and an attachment_type of board_items to bridge channel-memory attachments to board items.
contribution: Provides a UUID-identified, timestamped link from a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-728e1e2b, which a fused system could use to reconstruct attachment-to-board relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file (att-96c0eed1.md) for dragnet-development that references board item item-728e1e2b via attachment_type board_items and records an added ISO timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a timestamped link from a channel attachment to a specific board item.
